title: Illager Arena
description: Adds a giant Illager arena in the desert, filled with all kinds of Illagers and valuable loot
body:
### Illager Arena
**This mod adds a large Illager Arena structure to the game, where many Illagers live and fight.**

![Arena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e297f1f798a6a75ea7842f0e11075fc82d149d52.jpeg)

The arena has multiple sections: the battleground in the middle, spectator stands, preparation areas, sleeping quarters, a small blacksmith, and the Illusioner’s room with the best reward.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d0f8fee2bce33fb7335b01e93287814ea5a7df.jpeg)


Spawns:
The arena can only generate in the desert biome.

Illagers:
The arena is guarded by various Illagers, including regular Pillagers, Vindicators, Evokers, and even the Illusioner, all protecting the arena and its treasures.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1073b4cfa4deb1dd80f3b362521cb3cc9eaf07d0.jpeg)


Loot:
The arena is full of valuable items, including multiple captured Villagers and Allays, plus plenty of loot for those who conquer the Illager Arena.




**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
